name: The Arc Michigan
description: State chapter of The Arc advocating for people with intellectual and developmental disabilities across Michigan.

name: Michigan Early On Program
description: Michigan's early intervention program providing services for infants and toddlers from birth to age 3 with developmental delays.

name: Special Olympics Michigan
description: Year-round sports training and competition for children and adults with intellectual disabilities across Michigan.
address: Central Michigan University, Mt. Pleasant, MI 48859

name: C.S. Mott Children's Hospital - Developmental and Behavioral Pediatrics
description: Comprehensive developmental and behavioral pediatric evaluations and treatment at a top-ranked children's hospital.
address: 1540 E. Hospital Dr., Ann Arbor, MI 48109

name: Michigan Protection and Advocacy Service (MPAS)
description: Michigan's designated protection and advocacy organization providing legal services and advocacy for people with disabilities.

name: Michigan Assistive Technology Program (MATP)
description: Statewide program providing assistive technology device demonstrations, loans, and information for Michiganders with disabilities.

name: MiABLE Account
description: Tax-advantaged savings accounts for eligible Michiganders with disabilities to save without impacting public benefits.

name: Michigan Department of Health and Human Services - Developmental Disabilities
description: State agency providing developmental disability services, Medicaid waivers, and support for individuals with disabilities.

name: Camp Barefoot (Easterseals Michigan)
description: Residential summer camp for children and adults with disabilities featuring adaptive recreation and outdoor activities.

name: Michigan Alliance for Families
description: Parent training and information center providing support, resources, and advocacy training for families of children with disabilities.

name: Michigan Rehabilitation Services
description: State vocational rehabilitation services helping Michiganders with disabilities prepare for and obtain employment.

name: Michigan Medicaid HCBS Waivers
description: Medicaid waiver programs funding home and community-based services for Michiganders with disabilities.

name: SMART Connector Paratransit
description: ADA paratransit services providing door-to-door transportation for eligible riders with disabilities in the suburban Detroit area.

name: Beaumont Children's Therapy Services
description: Pediatric occupational, physical, and speech therapy services for children with developmental delays and disabilities.
